Package iwedia.dtv.comediaroutemanager

  • Method Details

    • getLiveRoute

      public int getLiveRoute(int listIndex, int serviceIndex, int prevRouteId)
      Gets live route for specified list, service index and id
      Parameters:
      listIndex - list index
      serviceIndex - service index
      prevRouteId - previously used live route id
      Returns:
      live route id or 0 if error occurs

    • getInstallRoute

      public int getInstallRoute(com.iwedia.dtv.comediaroutemanager.RouteManagerMediumType mediumType)
      Gets install route for specified medium type
      Parameters:
      mediumType - medium type to scan ({RouteManagerMediumType})
      Returns:
      install route or 0 if error occurs

    • getRecordRoute

      public int getRecordRoute(int listIndex, int serviceIndex)
      Gets record route for specified list and service index
      Parameters:
      listIndex - list index
      serviceIndex - service index
      Returns:
      record route id or 0 if error occurs

    • getPlaybackRoute

      public int getPlaybackRoute()
      Gets playback route
      Returns:
      playback route id or 0 if error occurs

    • getSIRoute

      public int getSIRoute(String url)
      Gets SI route for specified url
      Parameters:
      url - target url for SI stream
      Returns:
      SI route id or 0 if error occurs

    • getActiveLiveRouteCount

      public int getActiveLiveRouteCount()
      Get number of currently active live routes
      Returns:
      number of active live routes

    • getActiveLiveRoute

      public int getActiveLiveRoute(int index)
      Get active route Id for given index. Use getActiveLiveRouteCount method to get number of currently active live routes.
      Parameters:
      index - active route index
      Returns:
      route id
